subject: Next route scout: P8 attention-state data/value scope
body: Controller route for next P8 slice: please do a read-only scope scout for p8-attention-state, focused on the data/value model. Do not edit, claim implementation files, stage, enqueue, or commit yet. Inspect the existing TUI snapshot/operator-value/text surfaces plus existing comms seen/inbox semantics, then reply with the smallest exact implementation scope and tests you recommend for unread/seen or equivalent directed-thread triage. Acceptance target: a human can tell which directed conversations need action without raw JSON. Preserve honesty: this would advance P8-A4/P8-A1 but not complete P8 on its own.
